_meta.purpose: VAM V1.6 antigen-type adaptive parameter profile. Single source of truth for scenario-specific thresholds and tool overrides. Replaces hardcoded scenario branches in V1.5.x.

version_history.1.0.0: Initial V1.6 profile with 4 scenarios A/B/C/D
version_history.1.1.0: V1.6.1 patch — Stage 0 tool selection (Boltz-2 primary, AF3 server prohibited for production), short-peptide ipTM/PAE calibration

scenario_axes.secondary: antibody format (vh_vl / vhh) — affects fingerprint database choice

fingerprint_routing.vhh: data/reference/CDR_physchem_VHH71_v1.json (VHH-71, n=68; for design_prior fall back to CDR_physchem_thresholds_v1.json::vhh_* until VHH-71 priors regenerated)

stage0_tool_governance.rationale: Boltz-2 is MIT-licensed, AF3-class accuracy on antibody-antigen and protein-peptide complexes, integrated affinity head usable as Stage 7 ensemble third vote.
forbidden_tools_commercial_production: AF3_server (alphafoldserver.com) — non-commercial-only ToS; logged-in jobs are auditable by Isomorphic Labs
Chai-1 (no commercial license) — requires per-org license negotiation; do not use for IND / patent / external deliverables
ad_hoc_sanity_check_allowed: AF3_server is permitted for one-off validation experiments NOT entering any deliverable; outputs MUST NOT be cited in IND, patents, external reports, or model training data.

affinity_head_ensemble_policy.use_as: Stage 7 ensemble third vote alongside ESM-IF1 complex score and EvoEF2 reverse veto residual
do_not_use_as: absolute IC50/Kd predictor — affinity head training data is sparse on short peptides (<15 aa)
single-decision metric — always combine with at least 2 orthogonal signals
affinity_head_ensemble_policy.scenario_specific_calibration: Scenario A (short peptide): treat affinity_pred_value as relative-ranking signal only; Scenario D (hapten): not validated, default to skip.

B.label: Protein antigen + VH/VL or VHH (canonical scenario)

stage5_evoef2.rationale: Standard threshold; protein-protein interfaces have wide energy range and high SNR.

stage6_contact_veto.rationale: Protein antigens have many contact residues; n>=3 is the V1.5.1 default.

A.label: Short peptide antigen (<=30 aa) + VH/VL or VHH — e.g. PAG-1 ECD

stage0.iptm_calibration_note: Short-peptide ligand chains exhibit optimistic ipTM bias; raise threshold from 0.70 to 0.80 and add PAE cross-check below.
stage0.msa_rationale: Antibody MSA is contaminated by germline homologs; short peptides + GS linkers have no meaningful homologs. Empty MSA is the documented best practice.
stage0.rationale: Peptide flexibility requires higher sampling; floor restraint repels GS-linker / membrane-side direction.

stage5_evoef2.rationale: Short peptide has narrow ΔΔG range (low SNR); only flag extreme clashes.

stage6_contact_veto.rationale: Few peptide contacts; lowering to n>=2 prevents over-conservative veto on small interfaces.

tool_overrides.prodigy_rationale: PRODIGY contact-based scoring has no discrimination on peptide antigens (Absci benchmark global AUC ~0.46).
tool_overrides.boltz2_affinity_head_caveat: Short peptides under-represented in Boltz-2 affinity head training; use as relative ranking, never absolute IC50/Kd.

C.label: Protein antigen + VHH (alias of B for VHH; kept for V1.2 decision-matrix backward compat)

extra_constraints.vhh_hallmark_rule: Never mutate hallmark positions; redirect any candidate hitting these to PASS-only (no MUT).

D.label: Hapten / small-molecule antigen + VH/VL — e.g. Ab278 fentanyl

stage0.rationale: Hapten pose uncertainty is high; sample more orientations. Boltz-2 supports SMILES ligands directly.

stage5_evoef2.rationale: EvoEF2 small-molecule energy terms are usable; standard threshold applies.

stage6_contact_veto.rationale: Haptens have few residues but many heavy-atom contacts per residue; threshold counts contacts at the residue level.

tool_overrides.prodigy_rationale: Standard PRODIGY assumes protein-protein; PRODIGY-LIG is the validated hapten variant.
tool_overrides.mmgbsa_rationale: Single-trajectory MM/GBSA needs GAFF parameters for the ligand; ACPYPE preprocessing is required or tool is skipped.
tool_overrides.boltz2_affinity_head_rationale: Hapten affinity head not validated in current Boltz-2 release; skip until calibrated.

check_6_design_prior.rationale: Drop AAs observed at <0.5% frequency in natural antibodies at this CDR position; saves 30-50% downstream compute.

check_7_sequence_liability.rationale: Sequence-only screen at O(seq) cost; uses CDR_physchem_thresholds_v1.json p95/p99 bands.

check_8_relax_and_clash.rationale: MolProbity standard; >0.4 A is a flagged clash, >0.6 A cannot relax and is hard-vetoed.

compatibility.v15_2_fallback: If --scenario flag is omitted at CLI, system auto-detects via antigen length and chemistry, then applies V1.5.2 hardcoded defaults (equivalent to scenario B).
compatibility.downgrade_path: Set --skip-v16-gates to disable CHECK 6/7/8 entirely; system reverts to V1.5.2 behaviour.
compatibility.stage0_tool_override: CLI flag --stage0-tool {boltz2,boltz1,chai1,af2_multimer} override scenario default; non-Boltz options require --commercial-license-confirmed flag in production runs.
